task_description: Implement a Step Functions state machine skeleton triggered by the EventBridge rule, with a minimal Amazon Polly integration as a Task state. Follow strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal CDK code. Update ARCHITECTURE.md with the new orchestration layer.

verification.summary: All 16 tests pass. TypeScript compilation succeeds. cdk synth produces valid CloudFormation. Semantic review v2 approved. Two minor non-blocking notes: bucket policy could add aws:SourceAccount condition, EventBridge target test could assert specific state machine identity.
